reviews.comment:
Fuimos una mañana con una amiga del trabajo a comprarnos café para desayunar. La empleada que nos atendió nos dice que hay una promoción que podés agregar 2 bizcochos o 2 facturas por el mismo precio y nos da a cada uno una bolsa de papel para que nosotros los pongamos. A la hora de pagar nos vació las bolsas para contar que no estábamos llevando bizcochos o facturas demás. Lo hizo con otra gente también ¿Si desconfía por qué no hace ella ese trabajo si después estará sospechando que todos los clientes son ladrones? Encima el café horrible y mínimo, las medialunas secas, pura cáscara y aire. No fui nunca más.

(Translated by Google)
One morning, a friend from work and I went to buy coffee for breakfast. The employee who served us told us there was a promotion where we could add two pastries or two croissants for the same price and gave each of us a paper bag to put them in. When it came time to pay, she emptied our bags to make sure we weren't taking any extra pastries or croissants. She did this to other people too. If she doesn't trust us, why doesn't she do that herself if she's going to suspect all her customers are thieves? On top of that, the coffee was awful and tiny, and the croissants were dry, just crust and air. I never went back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25GNE9HNHdTRm8yUjBVeFkzUXRSVWRCVDFSTmFVRRAB
